title: Skydiving Plane Crashes in France, Killing All 11 People Aboard
summary_full: Five instructors, five students and a pilot died when the plane crashed on Sunday morning in a field near the northeastern city of Nancy.
summary_public: Five instructors, five students and a pilot died when the plane crashed on Sunday morning in a field near the northeastern city of Nancy.
